Name: Triple Chocolate Fudge
Description: A rich, dense chocolate sponge layered with silky ganache and topped with artisan chocolate shavings.

Name: Vanilla Bean Confetti
Description: Light and airy vanilla sponge packed with colorful sprinkles, finished with a classic buttercream frosting.

Name: Elegant Rose Tier
Description: A two-tier white velvet cake adorned with edible fondant roses and gold leaf accents. Perfect for intimate receptions.

Name: Red Velvet Cupcake
Description: Classic southern red velvet sponge topped with a generous swirl of cream cheese frosting.

Name: Unicorn Magic Cupcake
Description: A fun vanilla cupcake with rainbow swirl frosting and a fondant unicorn horn.

Name: Gingerbread Man Set
Description: A pack of 6 spiced gingerbread cookies decorated with royal icing. A holiday favorite.

Name: Salted Caramel Drip
Description: Toasted caramel sponge cake with a salted caramel drip glaze and macaron toppers.

Name: Pink Champagne Cake Pop
Description: Cake truffle infused with pink champagne flavor, dipped in white chocolate and pink sugar.
